title: FinalResearchReport
description: Coordinator's aggregated output. Each claim is tagged with the subagent that produced it and its source URL. Conflicts across subagents are surfaced as their own section rather than silently resolved.

question.description: The original broad research question submitted to the coordinator.

sub_questions.description: The decomposition produced by the coordinator before dispatching subagents.

subagent_ids.description: Identifiers of every subagent dispatched in this run (one per sub_question).

claims.description: Aggregated claims. Every claim in the final report carries provenance — subagent_id + source_url + confidence — inherited from the subagent handoff.

conflicts.description: Cross-subagent disagreements. When two subagents produce claims on the same entity with contradictory content, both claims are preserved here with their provenance — the coordinator does NOT silently pick one.

resolution.description: Documented failure-mode handling for contradictions. Demo default is 'deferred_to_user'.

coverage_gaps.description: Sub-questions or entities where no subagent produced reliable claims — the coordinator annotates these explicitly rather than letting the report look complete when it isn't.
